international_news.summary: France is experiencing a record June heatwave, leading to a surge in drowning deaths, with **40** people reported drowned. Popular cities have banned public alcohol consumption as individuals take risks to cool down amidst the scorching temperatures across Europe.

A decade after **Brexit**, the UK economy is estimated to be **6%** to **8%** smaller, marked by a demographic slide and **7** prime ministers. **Keir Starmer** is reportedly holding talks with **Andy Burnham** for an 'orderly' transition, as the nation reflects on a 'lost decade'.

Ukraine is escalating the cost of war for Russia, testing **Putin**'s resolve through strikes. Russia is considering a diesel export ban and fuel imports, while Crimea restricts public life. Fuel shortages and 'oil rain' are impacting Moscow, leading to lifted tanker entry permits to supply gas stations.

A new Pew global survey reveals overwhelmingly negative international reviews for **Donald Trump** and the US. **Trump**'s international approval rating stands at **23%**, with fewer countries viewing the US as a reliable partner, even among far-right groups.

Ten years post-**Brexit** vote, UK voters reflect on the decision to leave the European Union. The economic impact is becoming clearer, with a majority of Britons now believing leaving the EU was a mistake.

Ukraine claims a major Crimea bridge was destroyed in a recent attack, intensifying its campaign to isolate Russian-occupied Crimea. The blockade has resulted in no fuel for sale, increasing pressure on **Putin**.

Afghan **Taliban** officials held their first closed-door talks with EU representatives in **Brussels** to discuss deportations. The **Taliban** used the visit to advocate for consular access in Europe.

A UN report states that Israeli killings of Gaza children post-truce amount to genocide, with an independent commission finding Israel deliberately targeting Palestinian children and committing atrocity crimes.
**Wes Streeting** is considered the frontrunner to become the UK's next chancellor. Discussions are ongoing regarding potential members of **Andy Burnham**'s cabinet.

Albania's Prime Minister denies being 'the Godfather' amidst widespread protests against a luxury resort project backed by **Jared Kushner**. The protests have evolved into an anti-corruption movement, expressing anger at the government.

domestic_news.summary: The **IAEA** chief stated that Iran's nuclear sites are likely to be inspected. The Senate passed a resolution directing **Trump** to end hostilities with Iran, prompting **Trump** to lash out at **4** Republican 'losers' and call the vote 'meaningless'.

In the Pune fort murder case, **Ketan Agarwal**'s fiancee, **Siya**, and her lover, **Chetan**, have been sent to police custody until **June 29**. Police cracked the case by noting a hoodie in June heat and a phone left at the office, with **Ketan**'s father recalling ignored red flags about **Siya**'s constant phone use and mention of **Chetan**.

**Donald Trump**'s spat with **Lutnick** over India's tariffs on US goods was revealed, with **Trump** reportedly calling **Lutnick** 'an idiot' to his face and delighting in watching cabinet members clash.
A **10**-year-old girl was kidnapped, raped, and killed in Delhi, with her last words reportedly being 'Papa Mujhe Bacha Lo'. A cab driver has been arrested in connection with the crime.

India has strongly rebuffed Pakistan's 'will go to war' remarks concerning the **Indus Waters Treaty**, calling them a 'desperate bid' to cover Pakistan's own failings. India slammed **Khawaja Asif**'s threat, asserting the treaty's status.

**Wang Yi** called for India and China to accelerate the resumption of stalled dialogue mechanisms. At the **BRICS NSA Meet** in **New Delhi**, security advisors pushed for cooperation on threats, with China drawing lessons from the Iran war.

Monsoon rains have caused significant disruption in Mumbai, inundating low-lying areas and disrupting train services. The city experienced **200 mm** of rain in **24** hours, leading to a wall collapse, uprooted trees, and a crushed car.

CM **Vijay** delivered a 'short story' in the Assembly, prompting **Udhayanidhi Stalin** to remark that the House had turned into a cinema. **MK Stalin** criticized **Vijay**'s 'filmy' speech, while **Vijay** affirmed his ideological opposition to the **BJP**.

A fire in Lucknow tragically killed an engaged couple, turning wedding preparations into a funeral. An **SIT** is inspecting the site, while Congress alleges negligence by the **Uttar Pradesh** government. A crackdown on illegal coaching centers has been launched, with several sealed.

The Congress party is demanding the resignation of Madhya Pradesh CM **Mohan Yadav** and an independent probe into his family's land purchases in **Ujjain**. The **BJP** has dismissed these allegations as baseless.

business_news.summary: Dow, S&P **500**, and Nasdaq futures slipped amid growing doubts about the AI trade. Tech stocks retreated due to concerns over AI spending and valuations, with **Nasdaq** closing **2%** lower, led by **Micron**, following a **$1.3 Trillion** rout.

The Dow Jones Industrial Average will undergo a significant change on **June 29**, with **Alphabet** replacing **Verizon**. This reshuffle will pivot the index's industrial roots further towards technology.

Asian stocks are poised to extend an AI chip-fueled selloff, with stock futures mixed ahead of **Micron** earnings. The **Kospi** index, however, jumped over **3%**, as traders debate the extent of the tech sell-off.
**Elon Musk** has reportedly lost his trillionaire status as **SpaceX** stock dipped below its **$150** debut price after its blockbuster IPO, before a subsequent rebound.

China has reclaimed the title for the world's fastest supercomputer, with its **LineShine** machine taking the **Number 1** spot on the **TOP500** list, surpassing US machines for the first time since **2017**.

**FedEx** reported strong earnings in its last quarter, with revenue rising due to growth in package yields and volume in its freight business. Despite this, shares slid after a margin drop, though the company eyes an **11%** rise in **2026** revenue.
**Agility Robotics**, a maker of humanlike robots, is set to go public in a **$2.5 Billion SPAC** deal, reportedly through a merger with **Churchill Capital**.

Top talent departures from **Google DeepMind** raise questions about its future leadership in AI development. **Alphabet** experienced its worst day in over a year due to AI concerns, as **OpenAI** and **Anthropic** aggressively poach talent.
**Morgan Stanley** has capped withdrawals from its private credit fund after receiving **11.6%** in exit requests. The firm is limiting redemptions to **5%**.
**Prime Day 2026** deals are live, featuring over **125** deals with discounts up to **60%** off on products from brands like **Apple, Adidas, Hanes**, and **Shark**.

technology_news.summary: **Prime Day** deals are officially live, offering tech sales up to **54%** off on brands like **Apple, Sony, Bose**, and **Anker**. **AirPods** are also on sale with deep discounts.
**Prime Day** features significant TV deals, including **100**-inch **Hisense** TVs for **$2,000** off. Other brands like **TCL** and **Samsung** also have notable discounts on **4K** TVs.
**Valve** confirmed the **Steam Machine** will cost over **$1,000**, despite originally considering a **$750** price point for a barebones version. Analysts view it as a niche device.
**Prime Day** mobile tech deals include laptops, tablets, mini PCs, and accessories, with savings up to **$970** on **MacBooks** and **Windows PCs**.

**Amazon**'s **Prime Day** deals include significant discounts on **Garmin** smartwatches, with the new **Fenix 8 Pro** dropping to a record low price. Shoppers can find up to **$500** off, with some rugged smartwatches at **50%** off.
**Best Buy** has launched its **Tech Fest** event, offering major discounts on headphones, video games, and TVs starting at **$60**, presenting an alternative to **Prime Day** deals.

The **Google Store Prime Day** event features big deals on **Pixel 10, Watch 4**, and **Fitbit** products. The **Pixel 10** series is up to **$400** off, and the **Galaxy S26** is **$350** off, with the **Pixel 10 Pro** reaching its lowest price ever.

**Microsoft** has quietly launched **8GB RAM** models of the **Surface Pro** and **Surface Laptop** to combat skyrocketing prices. These budget-friendly options are noted as cheaper but potentially worse in performance.
**Meta** has launched a cheaper range of AI smart glasses, starting at **$299**, in partnership with **EssilorLuxottica**, as **Zuckerberg** continues to push wearables.

**Sega** announced two new **Sonic** game collections for the **Switch**: **Sonic Classic Collection** and **Sonic Modern Collection**. This move highlights **Sonic the Hedgehog**'s continued pursuit of **Mario** in the IP business, **35** years after its debut.

sports_news.summary: The **2026 NBA draft** saw **AJ Dybantsa, Darryn Peterson**, and **Cameron Boozer** among the first-round picks. The **Thunder** drafted a 'Wemby stopper' and traded up for a point guard.

England was held to a scoreless draw by Ghana at the World Cup, exposing concerns about their World Cup run despite closing in on a last-**32** passage. Fans lamented the draw, questioning the team's shooting and the performance of **Jordan Pickford** and **Ezri Konsa**.
The NFL has declined to hold a **2026** supplemental draft, citing **Brendan Sorsby**'s issues as 'too significant,' effectively pausing his NFL path and delivering a lesson in accountability.

Retired UFC fighter **Dustin Poirier** was arrested for public intoxication, with video showing erratic and threatening behavior. He was allegedly drunk in public and blocked from a **Delta** flight, threatening to fight police before his arrest.

**Lionel Messi** and **Kylian Mbappé** are dominating the World Cup with dazzling, history-making goals. They are leading the Golden Boot race, with **Erling Haaland** and **Harry Kane** also in contention.

The **Miami Heat**'s trade for **Giannis Antetokounmpo** has generated significant analysis from **15** national voices. The trade's implications for the **Bucks** and the **Celtics**, with **Brad Stevens** drawing a line, are being widely discussed.
**Colombia** secured a **1-0** victory over **DR Congo**, with **Daniel Muñoz** scoring his second goal of the World Cup. This win sends **Colombia** into the last **32** of the tournament.

The **Warriors** kept their draft pick, selecting **Michigan**'s **Yaxel Lendeborg No. 11** overall in the **2026 NBA Draft**. **Lendeborg** reportedly 'used to hate **Steph Curry**' as a **Kyrie** fan.
**Trae Young** welcomed **AJ Dybantsa** to **Washington D.C.**, hinting at his jersey number. The **Wizards** selected **BYU**'s **AJ Dybantsa** with the top pick of the **NBA draft**.

Following the failed pursuit of **Giannis Antetokounmpo**, discussions have emerged regarding potential trade destinations for **Celtics** star **Jaylen Brown**. **Brad Stevens** has directly addressed **Brown**'s situation, stating he is a 'big part' of the team but not predicting the future.

user_interest.summary: An anime adaptation of **Fool Night** has been announced, a collaboration between **Sunrise** and **SHAFT**.
Fans speculate that **Wes Bennett** from ‘Better Than The Movies’ has been cast in an upcoming project.
**Netflix** unveiled first looks at the ‘**One Piece**’ Anime and ‘**Blue Eye Samurai**’ Season **2** at the **Annecy Showcase**.
**Na Hong-Jin** will receive the Action Cinema Award at **NYAFF**, which will also host the North American premiere of ‘**Hope**’.
**Hololive production** is offering a Summer Experience at **Anime NYC 2026**.
**Tom Cruise** is celebrating **46** years in movies with a retrospective trailer and new digger footage for his latest film.
**Netflix** unveiled its upcoming Anime Slate at the **Annecy Festival**.
**Tom Cruise** is celebrating **46** years in cinema with a tantalizing teaser for his latest movie, which also serves as a retrospective of his career.
**Netflix**’s ‘**Fool Night**’ Teaser has successfully captured the manga’s cold, unsettling vibe.
A new trailer for **Tom Cruise**'s next movie has been released, which also functions as a trailer for all **Tom Cruise** movies, celebrating his **46** years in cinema.
**Netflix**'s anime viewership is skyrocketing, leading the platform to unveil ‘**Fool Night**’ and more of ‘**The One Piece**’ at **Annecy**.
Tuesday's viewing schedule includes the **Not Suitable For Work** Finale and the **NBA Draft**.
**Netflix** has unveiled the first images of ‘**Fool Night**’, its new anime series.
The complete guide for TV Premiere Dates **2026** has been released.
**Netflix** unveiled first looks at the ‘**One Piece**’ Anime and ‘**Blue Eye Samurai**’ Season **2** at the **Annecy Showcase**.

weather.summary: Good morning, Delhi! Expect another scorching day in **Connaught Place** as temperatures are currently hovering at a blistering **40.43°C** under a **clear sky**. Humidity remains low at just **22%**, offering little relief from the intense heat. Stay hydrated and take precautions against the sun.

finance.overview: Good morning, investors! Indian markets are showing strong positive momentum today, with all major indices in the green. The **NIFTY 50** is up **+0.88%** at **24033.85**, while the **BSE SENSEX** has climbed **+0.94%** to **76918.73**. Banking stocks are leading the charge, with the **NIFTY BANK** surging **+1.53%** to **58061.05**. On our watchlist, **ICICIBANK.NS** is a top performer, up **+2.33%** at **1369.50**, followed by **TCS.NS** gaining **+2.17%** to **2104.20**. **INFY.NS** is also performing well, rising **+2.04%** to **1050.30**, and **HDFCBANK.NS** is up **+1.93%** at **789.60**. **RELIANCE.NS** is seeing a modest gain of **+0.77%**, trading at **1319.60**. Globally, market sentiment appears mixed, with some concerns lingering over AI trade doubts and tech stock valuations, but the domestic market is clearly shrugging off those worries for now.
